meaning: n.[动] 爬虫类,爬行动物
examples: Objective: To investigate the interaction between Hb from two kinds of animals of Reptilia and BPB.
The crocodile is a general term of animals of Crocodilia, Reptilia, which have high economic and medical value.
A survey on the diversity of amphibia and reptilia was conducted in the field of Hubei Xieshan Nature Reserve in August 2005.
